sentences.arabic: كَانَ مَنْصُورٌ يَعُودُ الْمَرِيضَ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Mansur je svake sedmice posjećivao bolesnika.
sentences.translationEn: Mansur visited the sick person every week.

sentences.translation: Nosio mu je hranu i voće.
sentences.translationEn: He would bring him food and fruit.

sentences.translation: Sjedio bi s njim i razgovarao da mu bude društvo.
sentences.translationEn: He sat with him and talked with him to keep him company.

sentences.arabic: يَعْلَمُ أَنَّ عِيَادَةَ الْمَرِيضِ مِنَ حَقِّ الْمُسْلِمِ.
sentences.translation: Zna da je posjeta bolesnog pravo muslimana.
sentences.translationEn: He knows that visiting the sick is a right of the Muslim.
